prestazioni: K24A2 (2.4L i-VTEC) engine swap with a custom billet crankshaft from Manley Performance (4.150" stroke) and forged JE Pistons (12.5:1 compression) for a 2.7L stroker build, paired with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (1.06 A/R turbine housing) and a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate to handle 28 psi of boost

Full titanium valvetrain upgrade with Ferrea Competition Series intake/exhaust valves (1mm oversized), Supertech dual valve springs, and titanium retainers, mated to a K-Tuned Stage 3 billet camshaft set (272° intake / 268° exhaust duration, 12.5mm lift) with adjustable cam gears from Skunk2 Pro Series

Custom 4-1 equal-length stainless steel header from Hytech Exhaust, feeding into a 3.5" straight-pipe exhaust with a Burns Stainless muffler and a secondary 2.5" over-axle dump pipe for anti-lag, controlled by a Hondata KPro V4 ECU with a custom ethanol flex-fuel map and AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Element-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front lip, and rear diffuser, paired with a custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap and JDM-spec Honda Element SC decals (white/red) from DecalGirl

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Element-specific) with 8kg/mm front and 10kg/mm rear springs, adjustable camber plates from SPC Performance, and polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension (full set, including rear trailing arm bushings)

Custom rear cargo area roll cage from Custom Cages (UK), integrated with a Sparco Circuit II racing seat (Element-specific mounting brackets) and a Takata Drift III 4-point harness, alongside a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel with a NRG quick-release hub and a custom Element SC shift knob from 5x Racing
